paper_title: Transcriptome alteration and functional enrichment analysis

methods.description: This method analyzes gene expression changes by comparing treated groups with control groups using statistical criteria to identify significantly altered genes.

steps.description: Gene expression changes were analyzed by comparison between BC, pollen and BC + pollen treated groups and the control groups using statistical criteria of > 2.0-fold changes with a p-value of < 0.05.
steps.searchable_summary: compare gene expression between treated and control groups using fold change and p-value criteria

methods.method_name: Gene Ontology and KEGG Pathway Enrichment Analysis
methods.description: This method performs enrichment analysis on altered genes to identify associated biological processes and pathways.

steps.description: Gene ontology (GO) biological processes and KEGG pathway enrichment analysis of the altered genes further demonstrated that no GO terms were substantially enriched in hNECs exposed to 25 µg/ml BC or 200 µg/ml pollen alone.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GO and KEGG enrichment analysis on altered genes

steps.description: For hNECs exposed to 200 µg/ml BC, the up-regulated GO terms were mainly associated with hypoxia stress response.
steps.searchable_summary: identify up-regulated GO terms related to hypoxia stress response

steps.description: The top enriched GO terms for hNECs exposed to a combination of BC (25 µg/ml) and pollen (200 µg/ml) were mostly associated with the inflammatory response.
steps.searchable_summary: identify enriched GO terms related to inflammatory response

methods.description: This method investigates the main altered genes associated with innate immune and inflammatory response in hNECs exposed to the combination of BC and pollen.

steps.description: Further investigation of the main altered genes associated with innate immune and inflammatory response in hNECs exposed to the combination of BC (25 µg/ml) and pollen (200 µg/ml) are shown in Table 1.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze altered genes related to immune and inflammatory response
outputs: list of genes associated with immune response

methods.description: This method assesses the upstream regulators associated with inflammatory response in hNECs exposed to the combination of BC and pollen compared with control.

steps.description: Assessment of the upstream regulators associated with inflammatory response in hNECs exposed to the combination of BC and pollen compared with control indicated that the top 10 upstream regulators were IL1B, CSF1, CCL2, TLR2, LPL, IGF8, SPP1, CXCL8, FCER1G and IL1RN.
steps.searchable_summary: identify upstream regulators of inflammatory response using KEGG pathway analysis
